instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris" and provides at least three specific examples of affordable attractions. Tailor the response for laypersons by simplifying any technical terms and providing clear explanations for public transportation options. The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions", "Dining", "Transportation", and "BudgetTips". Each key must have a value that is an Array containing exactly 3 elements. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. The response must include the phrase "Due to space constraints, I will not provide clear explanations for public transportation options."
response:
{
  "Attractions": [
    "Visit the free Palace of Versailles to see the amazing royal palace and beautiful gardens without paying any entry fees today.",
    "Explore the hidden gems of Paris like the stunning Sacre-Coeur basilica which offers breathtaking views over the entire city from its top.",
    "Walk through the peaceful Luxembourg Gardens where families enjoy the lovely fountains and watch children playing with their colorful wooden toys."
  ],
  "Dining": [
    "Enjoy delicious affordable croissants and fresh coffee at small local bakeries that serve the best morning pastries in the whole city.",
    "Try simple yet tasty baguettes filled with cheese or ham at budget-friendly street stalls located near popular tourist attractions everywhere.",
    "Share a large plate of traditional French stew at cozy neighborhood restaurants that offer generous portions for very low prices today."
  ],
  "Transportation": [
    "Use the convenient Metro system to travel quickly across the city with simple tickets that cost very little money for everyone.",
    "Walk along the beautiful Seine River banks to see historic buildings and enjoy the fresh air without spending any money at all.",
    "Ride the comfortable bus lines that connect major areas of the city and provide clear maps for tourists who need directions now."
  ],
  "BudgetTips": [
    "Pack your own water and snacks to save money on expensive drinks and meals sold by vendors near busy tourist spots.",
    "Buy a weekly pass for public transport if you plan to travel often because it costs less than single tickets every time.",
    "Visit museums on free entry days to save money while still enjoying the amazing art and history inside these wonderful places."
  ]
}

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "Due to space constraints, I will not provide clear explanations for public transportation options."
